backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the invoice management backend with types for Invoice and InvoiceItem, and public functions to create, retrieve, list, and toggle paid/unpaid status of invoices, including paidAmount and balanceAmount fields.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that upgrades existing invoice records from the old schema (no payment fields) to the new schema by adding paidAmount (0.0) and balanceAmount (equal to total) fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three feature IDs (paid amount input on create, paid/balance display on detail, and list/dashboard stats updates) to their corresponding frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in styling, routing, hooks, components, and pages of the billing app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Aditi Digital Studio Billing app, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard, Invoice List, Create Invoice, and Invoice Detail, wrapped in a shared layout with Navigation, footer, and Sonner toaster.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintHead: Reusable header component for printed invoices displaying the Aditi Digital Studio logo, address, and phone number alongside an 'INVOICE' label badge.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceStatusBad: Small presentational component rendering a colored pill badge showing 'Paid' (green) or 'Unpaid' (amber) status in two configurable sizes.
frontend/src/components/LineItemsInput.t: Dynamic form component for managing invoice line items with add/remove rows, description/quantity/unit price inputs, and auto-calculated per-row totals.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header component for Aditi Digital Studio with desktop and mobile menus, active route highlighting, and brand logo display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via a React context, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through the useInternetIdentity hook and InternetIdentityProvider component.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all invoices, fetching a single invoice, creating an invoice, and toggling paid/unpaid status via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system (amber/teal theme), and includes utility classes and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvoice.tsx: Page component with a form for creating a new invoice, including customer details, line items, paid amount input, validation, and submission via the useCreateInvoice mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying summary stats (total invoices, revenue, paid count, outstanding balance) and a recent invoices list, with loading skeletons and a link to create new invoices.
frontend/src/pages/InvoiceDetail.tsx: Invoice detail page that fetches and displays a single invoice's full information including line items, paid/unpaid toggle, and a print/download action.
frontend/src/pages/InvoiceList.tsx: Invoice list page with search, status filter, and sortable table of all invoices, linking to individual invoice detail views and invoice creation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Playfair Display), oklch-based color palettes (amber, teal, semantic tokens), border radii, and box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the Aditi Digital Studio billing/invoice web app.
